历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4148 → 5967 → 7570 → 7635 → 10859, showing a continuous backward shift. In 2025, it shifted significantly backward by about 3224 places compared to 2024, with a notable decline. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 10859. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 8 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 9 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 7, a reduction of 2 (-22.22%) compared to 2025, which is a substantial reduction, significantly easing competition. It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with recent rankings stable in the 73–82 range, making it a top-tier language institution.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving controversies such as the academic qualifications of postgraduate entrance exam teachers. It ranks 39th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal of a significant drop in admission rankings for minor language majors, which has a lagging effect on application psychology. Foreign Language and Literature is rated A+ (top nationally), covering majors such as English (Foreign Language Education), English (Joint Training with Beijing Institute of Technology), Spanish, and Russian. Engineering majors like Computer Science and Technology, and Information Management and Information Systems have no separate discipline evaluation, relying on cross-development in the direction of language intelligence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Computer Science is 'recommended' (relatively hot), Electronic Information/Communication is 'highly recommended and hot', and Foreign Languages is 'generally wait-and-see'. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 137,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight decrease of about 1.4% from 139,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 425 points, which has been basically stable in recent years. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, with an enrollment proportion in Chongqing of about 2.5% (2025), making it a non-provincial institution, with neutral regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline of 10859, a significant enrollment reduction of 22.22% in 2026 (direction of decreasing ranking numbers), a negative reputation (direction of increasing ranking numbers), and a slight decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9461, with a range of 8961–9961.
